meta.title: Inalpha — Conversational AI agents for quant
meta.description: Open-source quant trading framework. Multi-agent LLM research, unified kernel where backtest = paper = live.

hero.tagline: Find alpha with a fox's eye.
hero.subtitle: The quant familiar · backtest = paper = live
hero.blurb: Conversational AI agents for quantitative research, strategy authoring, and paper trading — wired with Claude Code–grade engineering discipline.

loop.title: One loop. User → agents → kernels → strategy.
loop.blurb: An orchestrator routes your prompt across three Python kernels. Decisions flow back into the conversation — fully transparent.

data.title: data
data.desc: Multi-venue feeds: crypto, US, A-share, HK, JP, KR, AU, IN, UK, DE equities, global indices, FRED macro.

paper.title: paper
paper.desc: In-memory matching, backtest engine, and persistent paper trading with replay-able state.

research.title: research
research.desc: Multi-analyst LLM debate. Freshness-anchored. No stale numbers passed off as insight.

unified.title: Unified kernel
unified.desc: One strategy codebase across backtest, paper, and live. Behavior must be identical — or nothing is meaningful.

agents.title: Agents are first-class
agents.desc: Research, decision, risk, and review have dedicated agents — opposing stances, distinct toolsets, traceable decisions.

transparency.title: Transparency over precision
transparency.desc: Prefer an agent that says “I don't know” over one that sounds certain but cannot show its evidence.

discipline.title: Discipline over shortcuts
discipline.desc: Decision records, tests, declarative guards come first. Clever code is a bug nursery.

compounding.title: Long-horizon compounding
compounding.desc: Solid infrastructure before flashy features. Surviving long matters more than running fast.

markets.title: Markets we already cover.
markets.blurb: Crypto-first, multi-venue from day one. Each market routes through the same kernel and the same agent prompts.

discipline.title: Claude Code–grade engineering harness.
discipline.blurb: Declarative, config-driven, and reviewable. Not a chat wrapper.

chipDescs.subagent: Isolated subagents for risk and review.

cta.title: Star it. Read it. Tear it apart.
cta.blurb: Inalpha is alpha-stage and AGPL-3.0. No real money yet — but every line is on GitHub.

footer.tagline: Find alpha with a fox's eye.
